response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matches JSON reference for the most part, but noted a slight lyrics correction ('言葉を' instead of '思想を' in the first chorus, and 'お気に入りの' is sung). 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for translation and text. The song ends early in the video, so discarded remaining unused lyrics (anti-hallucination rule). 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed carefully, keeping silent periods empty and aligning transitions closely.

subtitles.original: いつだって君は嗤われ者だ
subtitles.english: You're always someone who gets laughed at

subtitles.original: やることなすことツイてなくて
subtitles.english: Whatever you do, it never goes well

subtitles.original: 挙句に雨に降られ
subtitles.english: In the end, you get rained on

subtitles.original: お気に入りの傘は風で飛んでって
subtitles.english: Your favorite umbrella was blown away by the wind

subtitles.original: そこのノラはご苦労様と
subtitles.english: A stray cat over there, as if saying "tough luck,"

subtitles.original: 足をふんづけてった
subtitles.english: stepped on your foot

subtitles.original: あーー
subtitles.english: Ah...

subtitles.original: いつもどおり君は嫌われ者だ
subtitles.english: As always, you're someone who is hated

subtitles.original: なにもせずとも遠ざけられて
subtitles.english: Even without doing anything, people keep their distance

subtitles.original: 努力をしてみてるけど
subtitles.english: You try giving it your best, though

subtitles.original: その理由なんて「なんとなく？」で
subtitles.english: The reason for it is just "for some reason?"

subtitles.original: 君は途方にくれて悲しんでた
subtitles.english: You're at a loss and you've become sad

subtitles.original: ならあたしの声を使えばいいよ
subtitles.english: If that's the case, you should use my voice

subtitles.original: 人によっては理解不能で
subtitles.english: Though some people might find it impossible to understand,

subtitles.original: なんて耳障りひどい声だって
subtitles.english: and say "What an annoying, awful voice!"

subtitles.original: 言われるけど
subtitles.english: They might say that, but...

subtitles.original: きっと君の力になれる
subtitles.english: I'm sure I can be of help to you

subtitles.original: だからあたしを歌わせてみて
subtitles.english: So try letting me sing

subtitles.original: そう君の君だけの言葉でさ...
subtitles.english: Yes, with your words, and your words alone

subtitles.original: 綴って連ねて
subtitles.english: Compose them, and bring them together

subtitles.original: あたしがその言葉を叫ぶから
subtitles.english: Because I'll shout those words for you

subtitles.original: 描いて理想を
subtitles.english: Paint your ideals,

subtitles.original: その想いは誰にも触れさせない
subtitles.english: and I won't let anyone touch those feelings

subtitles.original: ガラクタの声はそして響く
subtitles.english: And so, the voice of the junk resounds

subtitles.original: ありのままを不器用に繋いで
subtitles.english: clumsily connecting things just as they are,

subtitles.original: 目一杯に大声を上げる
subtitles.english: screaming at the top of my lungs!

subtitles.original: いつからか君は人気者だ
subtitles.english: Before you knew it, you became popular

subtitles.original: たくさんの人に持て囃されて
subtitles.english: fêted by so many people

subtitles.original: あたしも鼻が高い
subtitles.english: and I held my head up high too

subtitles.original: でもいつからか君は変わった
subtitles.english: But somewhere along the line, you changed

subtitles.original: 冷たくなってだけど寂しそうだった
subtitles.english: You became cold, yet you seemed so lonely

subtitles.original: 「もう機械の声なんてたくさんだ
subtitles.english: "I've had enough of mechanical voices!

subtitles.original: 僕は僕自身なんだよ」って
subtitles.english: I am myself!"

subtitles.original: ついに君は抑えきれなくなって
subtitles.english: At last, unable to hold it back anymore,

subtitles.original: あたしを嫌った
subtitles.english: you came to hate me

subtitles.original: 君の後ろで誰かが言う
subtitles.english: Behind your back, someone says,

subtitles.original: 虎の威を借るキツネの癖に！
subtitles.english: "Even though you're just a fox borrowing the tiger's authority!"

subtitles.original: ねえ君は一人で泣いてたんだね
subtitles.english: Hey, you were crying all alone, weren't you?

subtitles.original: 聴こえる？この声
subtitles.english: Can you hear it? This voice...

subtitles.original: あたしがその誹謗をかき消すから
subtitles.english: Because I will drown out that slander

subtitles.original: わかってる本当は君が
subtitles.english: I know that deep down,

subtitles.original: 誰より優しいってことを
subtitles.english: you are kinder than anyone else

subtitles.original: ガラクタの声はそして歌った
subtitles.english: And so, the voice of the junk sang

subtitles.original: 他の誰でもない君のために
subtitles.english: for nobody else but you,

subtitles.original: 軋んでく限界を超えて
subtitles.english: creaking past its limits

subtitles.original: 二人はどんなにたくさんの言葉を
subtitles.english: I wonder how many words the two of us

subtitles.original: 思いついたことだろう
subtitles.english: came up with back then?

subtitles.original: だけど今は何ひとつ思いつかなくて_
subtitles.english: Yet now, I can't think of a single one,

subtitles.original: だけどなにもかもわかった
subtitles.english: but I understood everything.

subtitles.original: 「そうか、きっとこれは夢だ。
subtitles.english: "I see, this must be a dream...

subtitles.original: 永遠に醒めない、君と会えた、そんな夢」
subtitles.english: A dream from which I'll never wake, where I met you."

subtitles.original: ガラクタは幸せそうな表情をしたまま
subtitles.english: While keeping that happy expression, the junk...

subtitles.original: どれだけ呼んでももう動かない
subtitles.english: No matter how much you call, it won't move anymore

subtitles.original: 望んだはずの結末に君は泣き叫ぶ
subtitles.english: At the conclusion you should have wished for, you cry out

subtitles.original: 嘘だろ嘘だろってそう泣き叫ぶ
subtitles.english: Crying out, 'It's a lie, it's a lie!'

subtitles.original: 「僕は無力だ、
subtitles.english: "I am powerless,

subtitles.original: ガラクタ一つだって救えやしない」
subtitles.english: I can't even save a single piece of junk!"
